original_image_tags: Typed letter on paper, showing the address block at top right:
Red "FLYING SAUCERS" stamp near top left.
Vertical red stamp along right edge:
Distribution list at top right margin (partially cut off):
Stamped registration info at bottom right:
Faint pencil notation at very bottom left:

elements.description: A circular postmark stamp in the upper right corner reading 'RAYNHAM, MA PM APR 19 1966 02761'.
A vertical list of names in the upper right margin, starting with 'Mr. Tolson' and ending with 'Miss Gandy'.
A vertical red stamped text on the right edge reading 'ED PROG.' with an associated date stamp 'APR 13-1966' and the number '68'.
A stamped text at the bottom right reading 'REC 20' followed by handwritten numbers '62-83 894-445', a date stamp '5 APR 1966', and a stamp reading 'CORRESPONDENCE'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, contradictory verbatim text for stamps (e.g., 'RAYNHAM, MA PM APR 19 1966 02761' vs. a general 'postmark'), and adds named entities (e.g., 'Mr. Tolson') not mentioned in A, indicating hallucination.
